parameters.name: Page
parameters.description: Page number your are on.

parameters.name: SizePage
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.description: Filter ressources with an amount equal to the selected value.

parameters.name: TypePayment
parameters.description: Filter by payment type.

schema.description:
Type of payment

| Status | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Free | Subscription is free, no payment ever requested. |
| ExternalCheck | Payment with check. |
| ExternalCash | Payment with cash. |
| ExternalBank | Payment by wire transfer. |
| ExternalOther | Other payment type. |
| Card | Payment with payment card, automated renewal. |
| DirectDebit | Payment with bank account info, automated renewal. |
schema.title: PaymentTypes

parameters.name: StatePayment
parameters.description: Filter by payment status.

schema.description:
Payment status

| Status | Description |
| Completed | Payment succeeded. |
| Pending | Payment is expected. |
| Failed | Payment has failed. |
| Canceled | Payment has been canceled. |
schema.title: PaymentStatus

parameters.name: DatePaymentMin
parameters.description: Filter resources with payment date greater then after the selected date.

parameters.name: DatePaymentMax
parameters.description: Filter resources with payment date lower then after the selected date.

parameters.name: AmountMin
parameters.description: Filter ressources with an amount greater then the selected value.

parameters.name: AmountMax
parameters.description: Filter ressources with an amount lower then the selected value.

parameters.name: IdCustomer
parameters.description: Filter ressources by customer Id.

parameters.name: IdInvoice
parameters.description: Filter ressources by invoice Id.

parameters.name: IdGatewayTransaction
parameters.description: Filter ressources by gateway transaction Id.

schema.description:
Allow to get detailed subresources about payment.

| Key | Description |
|---|---|
| all | Add all subressources.|
| Customer | Add details about the billed customer.|
| CustomerAddressBilling | Add billing address related to customer who paid the subscription.|
| CustomerBilling | add current custome billing.|
| CustomerSettingsPayment | Add details about the payment settings related to the customer.|
| GatewayTransaction | .|
| Invoice | .|
| InvoiceDebit | .|
| InvoiceCredit | .|
| Segment | Add details about the related segment.|
| UserCreation | Add details about the user who created the ressource.|
| UserUpdate | Add details about the user who last updated the ressource.|
schema.title: PaymentExtra

parameters.name: IdSegment
parameters.description: Filter ressources by segment Id.

parameters.name: ReferenceSegment
parameters.description: Filter by segment Reference

parameters.name: IdUserCreation
parameters.description: Filter by the id of the user who created the ressource.

parameters.name: DateCreationMin
parameters.description: Filter resources created from the selected date.

parameters.name: DateCreationMax
parameters.description: Filter resources created until the selected date.

parameters.name: IdUserUpdate
parameters.description: Filter by user id who made the last modification

parameters.name: DateUpdateMin
parameters.description: Filter resources updated after the selected date.

parameters.name: DateUpdateMax
parameters.description: Filter resources updated before the selected date.
